column12: N--VERY ODD conversation with editor at the Burlington Free Press (not the nicest man out there!). He said that if there is no attribution on the review he can't give permission (which makes no sense to me legally as it should be work for hire, but he wouldn't let me even finish a sentence). SO, let's add this book review to the master list and try to get a copy (just in case there is a byline...I doubt it). But we probably won't have permission to publish.
